name: Creamy Cheese Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE SHREDDED CHEESE AND FLOUR; SET ASIDE.
2. IN A SAUCEPAN, COOK GREEN PEPPER IN BUTTER UNTIL TENDER BUT NOT BROWN.
3. STIR IN WINE; HEAT SLOWLY JUST UNTIL BUBBLING.
4. GRADUALLY ADD SHREDDED CHEESE, STIRRING CONSTANTLY, UNTIL SMOOTH AND BUBBLY.
5. STIR IN CREAM CHEESE AND MUSTARD; COOK AND STIR OVER LOW HEAT UNTIL SMOOTH.
6. TRANSFER CHEESE MIXTURE TO FONDUE POT.
